channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned car with flat tyre, 16th April
item.description:
Abandoned car with flat tyre that hasn’t moved for many months. Looks like it’s been abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large overgrowing bush blocking pathway, 16th April
item.description:
This bush has been here for a while and has taken over half of the pathway and if anybody walks opposite me one of us has to go on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped waste, 16th April
item.description:
Fly tipped waste outside the entrance of the electrical substation

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Commercial Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste in playing fields, 16th April
item.description:
There is dumped waste inside the bull lane playing fields, next to the pavement but inside the playing fields

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amersham Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 fordwych road, 16th April
item.description:
There is a pothole that is getting worse and causing damage to cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Fordwych Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open green box of wires, 16th April
item.description:
Green box full of wires is open
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oaklands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large hole in the pavement by tree outside Gail's Bakery on Bromley Road., 16th April
item.description:
There is a large hole in the pavement by the tree opposite the entrance to Gails Bakery on Bromley Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-43, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St George's car park fly tipping near grey locker, 16th April
item.description:
Once again fly tipping has been done by the right-hand side of the grey locker. This consist of a large table, and broken bed stead various shoes and filled glass jars. Also behind the locker is a lot of rubbish and as well as being cleared needs a deep clean. Please could this be cleared as soon as possible, these items have been dumped at least three weeks ago. Thank you..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign old and faded, 16th April
item.description:
Bend ahead sign is old and faded and needs replacing please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three potholes, 16th April
item.description:
3 holes in close proximity between juncs with Bourne Vale and Wensum Pl - pls can they be repaired

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mounthurst Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti across all doors on this road, 16th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Montford Place, Oval, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti to wall, 16th April
item.description:
Reported several times over a few months - still not fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Montford Place, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and fly posting on nameplate, 16th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 410,412, Kennington Road, Kennington, Greater London

item.title: Building materials pallet dumped, 16th April
item.description:
Now left here for 1 week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 130, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush overgrown, 16th April
item.description:
Children use the pavement here every day, and the bushes are overgrown with thorny branches.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keeble Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bin, 16th April
item.description:
Bin needs emptying

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shelbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress in walkway, 16th April
item.description:
Mattress wasn't collected just moved. I'd being used by someone and needs to be taken away. More mattresses in the garages generally rhag are being used by foxes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed man hole cover, 16th April
item.description:
Collapsed man hole cover Lower marsh just after bridge on s/b towards elephant in bus lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westminster Bridge Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General tipping and unsightly waste, 16th April
item.description:
Can’t tell what is fly tipping or what is general disregard for public space by the owners of the Porsche garage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over filled skip, 16th April
item.description:
Skip overfilled by workmen on site, rubbish has fell on public footpath, foxes dragging foodwaste from bin and now attracting fly tipping.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
